title.en: After killing tens of thousands of moves, Ye Ti...

content.en:
There are many ultimate creatures in the Isle of Whiskers, and once you enter here, you will be attacked and killed by the native ultimate creatures here.

"Strange Domain!"

Ye Tian used this ultimate dimensional killing move, directly suppressing the spiritual will of this ultimate creature, causing its final speed to slow down.

Then.

Ye Tian's abyssal body killing move withstood the opponent's attack, and then after retreating, he used the abyssal spear to attack and kill this ultimate creature.

However, the strength of this ultimate creature is also extremely terrifying, and the strength of its physical body is not inferior to Ye Tian, but the realm of the ultimate rule is very low, and it is only a layer of ultimate rule.

After killing tens of thousands of moves, Ye Tian hit it hard.

But then, another ultimate creature arrived, forcing him to retreat.

"The Isle of Devil's Whiskers is really dangerous!"

After Ye Tian got rid of these two "Seven-Nine-Zero" Extreme Creatures, he soon encountered other Ultimate Creatures.

He spent some time in the midst of killing and killing.

During this period, he did discover some good things, which are resources that are difficult to see in the outside world.

However, if this continues, there is no way to grab many resources.

"It seems that you have to copy the ultimate creature to avoid being attacked and killed. "

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Thereupon.

He copied the body of an ultimate creature and roamed the world as the ultimate creature.

Of course, the ultimate creatures he copied were themselves the ultimate creatures of the Isle of Whiskers, so they would run into each other.

So, he had to kill the ultimate creature.

Soon, Ye Tian's four replica bodies went to attack and kill the ultimate creature together, and with a desperate posture, they sacrificed a replica body, killed the ultimate creature in a short time, and then let the replica of the ultimate creature come over, pretending to be hit hard.

Then he departed.

......

"Very good, it should be much safer to roam the Isle of Devil's Whiskers as this bluffing ultimate creature!"

Ye Tian muttered.

Sure enough, he kept walking, and once he strayed into the territory of other ultimate creatures, unless he was too close to the other party and was expelled by the opponent's aura, there would be no battle.

This shows that the ultimate creatures of the Isle of Demon's Whiskers will only have killing intent towards outsiders.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian is looking for treasure resources on the Island of Demon Whiskers, what he urgently needs now is the kind of treasure that can assist him in comprehending the ultimate rules, and the demand for treasures to improve cultivation and temper the body is not high, but if he encounters it, he will also take it.

"The ultimate creatures on the Isle of Demon's Whiskers are all powerful, and it seems that they are cultivating the same ultimate system, and the ultimate rules are the same. If they can all master the ultimate rules, there must be treasures here that allow the ultimate creatures to comprehend the ultimate rules. I must find this treasure and snatch it away. "

Ye Tian said darkly.

Subsequently.

He began to search for this treasure, and time passed slowly.

And Ye Tian's true body copy body is outside the Demon Whisker Island, occasionally go in and then transfer the treasure resources found by bluffing the copy body.

In a flash, a long time passed.

Ye Tian has been messing around on the Devil's Whisker Island for a long time, and finally knows a lot about this Devil's Whisker Island.

There are about more than three hundred ultimate creatures on this island, and about two hundred and fifty of them all have strength that is not weaker than him, and such a huge force is extremely terrifying if it is placed in the outside world.

With the exception of the Ultimate Realm Master, these Ultimate Creatures can sweep across the entire multidimensional territory.

However, these Ultimate Creatures should have no hope of becoming the Ultimate Realm Lord-level existence, perhaps because of the suppression of the Tianqu Forbidden Zone, they were almost unable to impact the higher realm.

And after such a long period of understanding, he finally knew that there is a special plant on the island of the magic beard - the vine of the magic beard, this kind of vine of the magic beard will bear a kind of fruit every few years, and after eating this fruit, you can understand the ultimate rules, and the effect is quite good.

Many ultimate creatures are able to comprehend the ultimate rules because they have eaten the fruit of the vine of the whiskers.

Now, the day has not yet come for the Whisker Vine Fruit to be born.

But Ye Tian also knew very well that with so many ultimate creatures, the Demon Whisker Vine Fruit was born, how much could he snatch?

Even if you snatch a few, it doesn't make much sense.

His goal was the Whisker Vine, but when he saw the Whisker Vine, he knew he couldn't snatch it away at the moment.

Because this thing turned out to be the ultimate creature, the ultimate creature of the plant system, and the breath is too terrifying, those ultimate creatures can snatch those fruits, it is estimated that it doesn't care 0

This guy's aura far surpasses that of other ultimate creatures, and Ye Tian can't be an opponent.

However, it is not impossible to sacrifice some replica bodies and cut off a vine from its body.

His defenses are extremely terrifying, and he also has the ultimate dimensional killing move of Split Light, and he is very good at escaping.

So on this day, Ye Tian mobilized six replica bodies, five of which were hidden inside the replica body of Bluff, and then approached the vine of the demon beard.

The Vine of the Whiskers, the ultimate plant-based creature, seemed to be asleep, and didn't care about the ultimate creature like Bluffing.

After all, on the Isle of Whiskers, it didn't worry about its safety in the slightest.

If a strong person really breaks in, other ultimate creatures will also block it, and if it can't be stopped, the fluctuations of the battle will also wake it up.

But it never expected that Ye Tian would break in and get close to it by relying on the bluffing copy body.

"Kill!"

Ye Tian's other five true body copies appeared, and they all used killing moves to attack the vine of the Demon Whisker.

Bang!!!!!

Caught off guard, a section of the vine of the Demon Whisker Vine was cut off, and then one of Ye Tian's duplicate bodies was immediately put away.

Rumble!!

The vine of the demon whisker awakened, and the terrifying aura spread, killing Ye Tian in an instant.

Bluffing these 5.0 copy bodies to sacrifice himself to intercept them, and other copy bodies were responsible for breaking off, Ye Tian used the Split Light Ultimate Dimension killing move and quickly escaped.

One ray of light flew out, and even the Demon Whisker Vine didn't know which ray to intercept, and it was intercepted by Ye Tian's other copy bodies, and there was no way to intercept it.

Therefore, the vine of the demon whisker wanted to kill several copies of Ye Tian's body.

Rumble!!!!

The bluffing copy body was the first to be killed, and there was no power to resist, and several other copy bodies were also severely injured in a short time, and then other ultimate creatures came over and besieged Ye Tian.

In this way, Ye Tian's duplicate bodies fell one after another.

However, Ye Tian had a replica body that escaped from the Island of Demon Whiskers, and then successfully escaped and hid.
